daily.today_energy: Your intuition is firing on all cylinders today, bestie. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your spiritual GPS. Channel that intense Scorpio energy into something creative or transformative.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing your energy from afar, and honestly, the universe is setting something up. Whether it's deepening a current connection or sparking something new, vulnerability hits different today.
daily.career: Your ability to see what others miss is your superpower right now. Speak up in that meeting or project—your perspective is exactly what's needed. Don't dim your light waiting for permission.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding today. That could be a walk, some stretching, or literally touching grass. You've got mad regenerative energy, so honor it by doing something that feels restorative.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about shedding what no longer serves you. Venus is encouraging you to lean into your natural magnetism and trust your gut instincts. Something unexpected might shift your perspective in the best way.
weekly.love: Your emotional depth is your superpower right now. If you're coupled up, meaningful conversations are flowing naturally. Single? Someone intriguing might cross your path when you're not actively looking. Stay open.
weekly.career: Your hustle is being noticed, even if you can't see it yet. This is the week to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or have that conversation you've been avoiding. Your confidence is the real asset here.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not just scrolling in bed. Try something that grounds you—whether that's moving your body, journaling, or just being outside. Your nervous system will thank you for slowing down.
